title: macaranga carrii var. womersleyi
intro: Macaranga carrii var. womersleyi, also known as Womersley's Macaranga, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of bioactive compounds. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by decocting its roots and leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
